name: Elmer Beckworth

contactInfo.office: 135 S. Main St., Suite 200, Rusk, TX 75785

bio: Elmer Beckworth serves as the District Attorney for Cherokee County, leading felony prosecutions in the Rusk area. He is committed to upholding justice and ensuring the safety of Cherokee County residents.
campaignPromises: Combat illegal drug activity in Cherokee County
Support and advocate for victims of crime
Ensure transparency in the DA's office operations
Partner with local agencies to improve community safety
